series_metadata.series_description: LEAPS (Liquid Effluent Analysis Processing System) Contains general information on all permit holders: initial, interim, and final limitation tables and geocoordinates and discharge networks for each entity discharging into waters of the state.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area until ob- solete, superceded, renewed, trans- ferred, or replaced, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper
